name: gum
description: A tool for glamorous shell scripts

subcommands.name: choose
subcommands.description: Choose an option from a list of choices

options.description: Prefix to show on item that corresponds to the cursor position
Prefix to show on the cursor item
Prefix to show on selected items
Prefix to show on unselected items
Options that should start as selected
Maximum number of options to pick
Pick unlimited number of options (ignores limit)

subcommands.name: confirm
subcommands.description: Ask a user to confirm an action

options.description: The title of the affirmative action
The title of the negative action
Display from the bottom of the screen

subcommands.name: format
subcommands.description: Format a string using a template

subcommands.name: spin
subcommands.description: Display spinner while running a command

options.description: Text to display to user while spinning
Alignment of spinner with regard to the title

subcommands.name: style
subcommands.description: Apply coloring, borders, spacing to text

args.name: text
args.description: Text to which to apply the style

options.description: Initial value (can be passed via stdin)
Maximum value length (0 for no limit)

subcommands.name: file
subcommands.description: Pick a file from a folder

options.description: Maximum number of files to display

args.name: path
args.description: The path to the folder to begin traversing
